raw_text: Hi team, this is Rohan Sharma from Apex Logistics. We are urgently looking to upgrade our CRM system for 50 agents before next quarter. I want to schedule a demo ASAP. You can reach my direct line at 98765-43210 or email me at r.sharma@apexlogistics.in. Is Thursday 2PM IST open?

Hey, reaching out regarding a potential tech partnership. I'm Sarah Jenkins, VP of Engineering at CloudScale. We don't have an immediate timeline, just exploring options for now. email: sarah.j@cloudscale.io
